title: Music for Madame
writer: Robert Harari, Gertrude Purcell, F. Hugh Herbert
actors: Nino Martini, Joan Fontaine, Alan Mowbray
plot: A singer arriving in Hollywood is tricked by jewel thieves to distract a wealthy audience. After running away he'll have to find a way to prove his innocence to both the police and the young girl composer he's fallen in love with....
